mapper.insert: INSERT INTO parking_log (license_plate, entry_type, vehicle_id, visitor_vehicle_id, fixed_visitor_vehicle_id, logged_at) VALUES (#{licensePlate}, #{entryType}, #{vehicleId}, #{visitorVehicleId}, #{fixedVisitorVehicleId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT vehicle_id FROM vehicle WHERE license_plate = #{licensePlate} AND status = 'APPROVED' LIMIT 1
SELECT visitor_vehicle_id FROM visitor_vehicle WHERE license_plate = #{licensePlate} AND visit_date = CURDATE() AND status = 'APPROVED' AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT fixed_id FROM fixed_visitor_vehicle WHERE vehicle_number = #{licensePlate} AND is_deleted = 0 AND start_date <= CURDATE() AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= CURDATE()) LIMIT 1
SELECT CONCAT(h.dong, ' ', h.ho, ' ', u.name) FROM vehicle v JOIN user u ON v.user_id = u.user_id JOIN household h ON v.household_id = h.household_id WHERE v.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN entry_type = 'IN' AND DATE (logged_at) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS today_in, SUM(CASE WHEN entry_type = 'OUT' AND DATE (logged_at) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS today_out, SUM(CASE WHEN vehicle_id IS NULL AND visitor_vehicle_id IS NULL AND fixed_visitor_vehicle_id IS NULL AND DATE (logged_at) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unregistered, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(logged_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS month_total FROM parking_log
